name: Women's Dress – Fashion Editorial Promo Flyer
svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 1080 1350" width="1080" height="1350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="wd-right" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1350" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_PANEL_TOP"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_PANEL_BOTTOM"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="wd-img-fade" x1="680" y1="0" x2="860" y2="0" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_PANEL_BOTTOM" stop-opacity="0"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_PANEL_BOTTOM" stop-opacity="1"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="wd-img-fade-b" x1="0" y1="1000" x2="0" y2="1350" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_PANEL_BOTTOM" stop-opacity="0"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_PANEL_BOTTOM" stop-opacity="0.7"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="wd-cta" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1" gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_DARK"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="wd-img-vignette" cx="40%" cy="50%" r="55%">
      <stop offset="50%"  stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_PANEL_BOTTOM" stop-opacity="0"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_PANEL_BOTTOM" stop-opacity="0.5"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <clipPath id="wd-img-clip">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="820" height="1350"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- LAYER 1: dark background -->
  <rect width="1080" height="1350" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_PANEL_BOTTOM"/>

  <!-- LAYER 2: right editorial panel -->
  <rect x="820" y="0" width="260" height="1350" fill="url(#wd-right)"/>
  <line x1="820" y1="0" x2="820" y2="1350" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.25"/>

  <!-- LAYER 3: product image full-bleed left -->
  <g clip-path="url(#wd-img-clip)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE" x="0" y="0" width="820" height="1350" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>
  <rect x="0"   y="0"    width="820" height="1350" fill="url(#wd-img-vignette)"/>
  <rect x="680" y="0"    width="140" height="1350" fill="url(#wd-img-fade)"/>
  <rect x="0"   y="1000" width="820" height="350"  fill="url(#wd-img-fade-b)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 4: vertical store name spine -->
  <text x="950" y="1240" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="8" transform="rotate(-90 950 1240)">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_SPINE</text>
  <line x1="966" y1="60" x2="966" y2="1290" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.2"/>

  <!-- LAYER 5: season / collection label -->
  <text x="862" y="96"  font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="5">PLACEHOLDER_SEASON</text>
  <text x="862" y="118" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.2" letter-spacing="5">COLLECTION</text>
  <line x1="836" y1="134" x2="1056" y2="134" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.3"/>

  <!-- LAYER 6: collection name -->
  <text x="862" y="260" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif" font-size="52" font-weight="600" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_COLL_LINE1</text>
  <text x="862" y="322" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif" font-size="52" font-weight="600" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_COLL_LINE2</text>
  <text x="862" y="384" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif" font-size="52" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" font-style="italic" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_COLL_LINE3</text>
  <line x1="836" y1="404" x2="1056" y2="404" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.2"/>

  <!-- LAYER 7: product detail rows -->
  <text x="862" y="444" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.35" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_DETAIL1_LABEL</text>
  <text x="862" y="466" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.65" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_DETAIL1_VALUE</text>
  <line x1="836" y1="484" x2="1056" y2="484" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.15"/>

  <text x="862" y="516" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.35" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_DETAIL2_LABEL</text>
  <text x="862" y="538" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.65" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_DETAIL2_VALUE</text>
  <line x1="836" y1="556" x2="1056" y2="556" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.15"/>

  <text x="862" y="588" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.35" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_DETAIL3_LABEL</text>
  <text x="862" y="610" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.65" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_DETAIL3_VALUE</text>

  <!-- colour swatches -->
  <circle cx="862" cy="638" r="10" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_SWATCH1" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-opacity="0.4"/>
  <circle cx="886" cy="638" r="10" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_SWATCH2" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-opacity="0.2"/>
  <circle cx="910" cy="638" r="10" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_SWATCH3" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-opacity="0.2"/>
  <line x1="836" y1="660" x2="1056" y2="660" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.15"/>

  <text x="862" y="692" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.35" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_DETAIL4_LABEL</text>
  <text x="862" y="714" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.65" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_DETAIL4_LINE1</text>
  <text x="862" y="734" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.65" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_DETAIL4_LINE2</text>
  <line x1="836" y1="754" x2="1056" y2="754" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.25"/>

  <!-- LAYER 8: price -->
  <text x="862" y="790" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="11" font-weight="200" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.7" letter-spacing="5">PRICE</text>
  <text x="862" y="862" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"      font-size="68" font-weight="900" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_VALUE</text>
  <text x="862" y="892" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="12" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.35" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_SUB</text>
  <line x1="836" y1="912" x2="1056" y2="912" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.25"/>

  <!-- LAYER 9: CTA + contact -->
  <rect x="836" y="932" width="220" height="56" rx="0" fill="url(#wd-cta)"/>
  <text x="946" y="968" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif" font-size="18" font-weight="600" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_TEXT</text>
  <text x="862" y="1010" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.25" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_URL</text>
  <text x="862" y="1030" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.2"  letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_PHONE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 10: bottom-left brand overlay on image -->
  <text x="48" y="1108" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="11" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.3" letter-spacing="6">PLACEHOLDER_NEW_IN_LABEL</text>
  <text x="48" y="1196" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"      font-size="112" font-weight="900" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-3">PLACEHOLDER_BRAND_WORD1</text>
  <text x="48" y="1260" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"      font-size="46"  font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" font-style="italic" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_BRAND_WORD2</text>
  <line x1="48" y1="1284" x2="420" y2="1284" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.25"/>
  <text x="48" y="1308" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="12" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.22" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_BOTTOM_TAGLINE</text>
</svg>
